name: Try To Remember
developer: Sergi Monreal Ibañez, Miquel Villalobos Verde, Carlos Diaz Muñoz, Kainaris Alzabaar
short_description: You have 50 seconds to look around a certain room. The detective will ask you questions about that room. Choose the correct anwer. If you fail 3 times, it's Game Over. If you don't remember something,
